entity.label: Naphish
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Refresher, one of the sons of Ishmael (Gen. 25:15; 1 Chr. 1:31). He was the father of an Arab tribe.

nodes.label: Naphish
nodes.description: Refresher, one of the sons of Ishmael (Gen. 25:15; 1 Chr. 1:31). He was the father of an Arab tribe.

verses.text: And they made war with the Hagarites, with Jetur, and Nephish, and Nodab.
